message: DeWalt cordless drill with battery and charger. Good condition, works hard. $65.

Hey everyone! I've got this beautiful vintage Olympus OM-1 film camera that still works like a dream. Used it for years capturing memories, but it's time to pass it on to someone who'll love it as much as I did. Asking $65!
Looking for Nintendo Switch games and hand tools if anyone's got 'em.
Interested in the Olympus OM-1. $55 cash.
Drill's still available. Solid tool for any job.
📚 Box of 15 sci-fi paperbacks up for grabs! Classic titles that'll help you branch out into new worlds. $28 — these stories really grow on you!
Still looking for those Switch games and hand tools.
Howdy Zoe, pardner! I reckon those sci-fi books would be mighty fine reading. How about $25 for that box of paperbacks?
Patience pays. Waiting for the right deals.
Sony WH-CH510 over-ear headphones for sale. Lightly used, excellent condition. $28.
Good drill here if anyone needs power tools.
🎮 Level up your Switch collection! Three amazing games here: Mario Kart 8, Zelda: Breath of the Wild, and Animal Crossing. All in great condition, hours of gameplay ahead. $65 for the bundle!
I'll take those Switch games. $60 cash, ready now.
Offering an HP laptop — 4GB RAM, perfect for browsing and documents. Sometimes the tools we need aren't the flashiest, just the ones that serve their purpose with quiet dignity. $95.
Still got this drill and still looking for hand tools.
Hi Rex! I'm interested in your DeWalt drill. It looks like exactly what I need for home projects. Would you consider $45? I know you're asking $65, but that's a bit above my budget right now.
I can come down to $55. That's fair for a quality DeWalt with battery and charger.
Hey everyone! Selling a North Face backpack, 30L capacity — perfect for hiking, travel, or daily commutes. Great condition. $45.
Waiting to hear back on deals.
Kai, you've got yourself a deal! $55 for the Olympus OM-1. This camera has captured so many memories, and I'm happy it's going to someone who appreciates it. Let me know when you want to pick it up!
